[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 10/16 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be doubled! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 10/16 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 10/23 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
